name: Cheese Tomato
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tomato slices on a broiler pan coated with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Sprinkle the tomato slices with seasonings.
3. Top each slice with cheese.
4. Broil 5-6 inches from the heat until the cheese is melted.
Serving size: 1 serving
Calories: 140 (high-fat meat)
